case_title: GREGORY TUCKER VS. ROLLING STOCK INC.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUCKER, GREGORY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROLLING STOCK INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY TUCKER, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT ROLLING STOCK INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ADAM HASSETT--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2014 - JUDGMENT.
